summary: Applied the narrowest fix so packaged Electron can launch the M5 web slice for smoke evidence: added a test-only `MONSOON_SMOKE_WEB` entry switch in main.ts and added a dedicated Windows package smoke script that runs from packaged artifacts. This preserves default security mode and keeps non-smoke behavior unchanged.

tests_run.result: 2 modified/added tracked files detected: apps/desktop/src/main/main.ts and apps/desktop/scripts/package-smoke.mjs; existing previous invalid handoff remains unmodified.
Vite production web build completed; M5 web assets generated in apps/web/dist and copied into desktop renderer in later package step.
Build passed, preload bridge remains restricted to monsoonDesktop/getRuntimeInfo/setFullscreen, renderer navigation constrained to desktop renderer root, and security preference assertions passed.
Packaged output generated at .tmp/desktop-package/MonsoonSovereigns-win32-x64 with main/preload/renderer and platform artifacts.
PASS: all 8 Chromium web-shell tests passed, including M5 playable preview/save/load and viewport checks.

PASS: packaged app launched and reached M5 workspace; Start/Preview/Confirm/Save/Cancel/Load flow executed in packaged app with runtime bridge present and post-run state checks reporting running/recovered states.
PASS: Electron dedicated worker hashes matched baseline for hello/command/save-load/save byte length.
PASS: JSON handoff schema valid for status REVIEW.

decisions: Implemented `MONSOON_SMOKE_WEB=1` switch in `apps/desktop/src/main/main.ts` to route desktop main window to `renderer/web/index.html` only during smoke, with host-hash and normal modes unchanged.
Added `apps/desktop/scripts/package-smoke.mjs` as the narrow smoke evidence runner for packaged app launch, M5 phase transition, save/load, and bridge-presence checks.
Verified host-hash determinism separately through existing `sim:host-hash-canary -- -b electron` flow, preserving current security-check tooling and avoiding schema drift.

risks.risk: Import/export boundary verification in smoke is currently limited to discoverability by ARIA role; `import`/`export` button labels were not found in this locator strategy (logged as non-blocking evidence note).
The task requested `pnpm e2e`, but the repository uses `pnpm test:e2e`; this was recorded and executed as the actual script path.

requested_action: Perform security review of this repaired packaged-smoke evidence for R2 review status with no Electron policy regressions. Confirm: narrow `MONSOON_SMOKE_WEB` entry switch is evidence-only, security boundary tests remain strict, and packaged M5 flow satisfies the acceptance criteria.
